title: Maximize your maturity
introduction: Maximize your voting rewards by optimizing your neurons' parameters. The maximum maturity rate of {{maxApy}} is achieved with:

optimalSettings.title: Optimal settings
optimalSettings.locked: Not dissolving (countdown paused for maximum rewards).
optimalSettings.autoStake: New maturity is added to your neuron's locked balance automatically.

noNeurons: No neurons yet. Create one to start minting rewards!
